issues.title: shadowing-local
issues.description:
DecentralizedVoting.winnerDescription().winnerDescription (contract.sol#60) shadows:
	- DecentralizedVoting.winnerDescription() (contract.sol#60-62) (function)
issues.recommendation: Review and apply security best practices

issues.title: solc-version
issues.description:
Version constraint ^0.8.20 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- VerbatimInvalidDeduplication
	- FullInlinerNonExpressionSplitArgumentEvaluationOrder
	- MissingSideEffectsOnSelectorAccess.
It is used by:
	- ^0.8.20 (contract.sol#2)

issues.title: cache-array-length
issues.description: Loop condition i < proposals.length (contract.sol#52) should use cached array length instead of referencing `length` member of the storage array.
